RUNIC SHOP

          Aether Shards:  0
        


        

          
          

            
            
Health Potion

            
Restores 50 HP

            
          


          
          

            
            
Mana Potion

            
Restores 30 Mana

            
          


          
          

            
            
Runic Heart

            
Perm +15 Max HP

            
          


          
          

            
            
Mana Well

            
Perm +10 MP & +0.3/s Regen

            
          


          
          

            
            
Relic Chest

COLLECTION & GEAR

          

            Shards:  0
          

          
        


        
        

          
          
          
          
        


        
        

          
Equip runes to activate their bonuses. Click a rune from storage to equip it. Click an equipped rune to unequip.


          
EQUIPPED RUNES

          

            
          


          
RUNE STORAGE

          

            
          

        


        
        

          


            
            

              
EQUIPPED

              

                

                  
HELMET

                  
                  
Empty Helmet Slot

                

                

                  
ROBE

                  
                  
Empty Robe Slot

                

                

                  
BOOTS

                  
                  
Empty Boots Slot

                

                

                  
                

                

                  
WEAPON

                  
                  
Empty Weapon Slot

                

                

                  
RING

                  
                  
Empty Ring Slot

                

              

            


            
            

              
GEAR STORAGE

              
Click a piece of gear to equip it. Click an equipped slot to unequip.

              

                
              

            


          

        


        
        

          
Configure your active hotbar assignments. Click an unlocked spell, then click an active slot to assign it.

          

            Slots: 5 / 7
            
          

          

            
            

              
UNLOCKED SPELLS

              

                
              

            


            
            

              
ACTIVE SLOTS

              

                
              

              
Drag a spell onto a slot — or select a spell then click a slot.

            

          

          

            
          

        


        
        

          
Earn badges by completing challenges during your odyssey.

          

            
          

        


        
        

          
        

      

    


    
    

      

        

          
DUNGEON MAP

          
        

        

          
        

        

           Player
           Chest
           Shrine
           Special Room
        

        

          
          
        

      

    




    
    

      

        
SELECT GAME MODE

        

        
        

          
          

            

              
            

            
TUTORIAL

            
Learn the basics of moving, casting spells, triggering elemental combinations, and equipping gear.

            
          


          
          

            

              
            

            
WEAVER MODE

            
The standard endless spell-weaving challenge. Defeat waves, collect shards, and climb the Leaderboard.

            
          


          
          

            

              
            

            
STORY MODE

            
Unravel the mysteries of the Aether Web in a handcrafted 5-chapter narrative campaign.

            
          


          
          

            

              
            

            
MULTIPLAYER

            
Co-op with fellow Runeweavers or duel in active PvP arenas. (Coming Soon!)

            
          

        


        

          
        

      

    


    
    

      

        
CUSTOMIZATION

        

        
        

          
        

        
        

          
          Aether Blue

⚠️ MOBILE SYSTEM DETECTED

      

        AETHERWEAVER IS NOT SUPPORTED ON MOBILE SCREENS. CONTROLS REQUIRE A PHYSICAL KEYBOARD AND MOUSE.
